hooks.command: echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | grep -iE '(appsettings\.Development|appsettings\.Production|appsettings\.Staging|\.env|secrets/)' && echo 'Blocked: sensitive file access' && exit 2 || exit 0
echo 'WARNING: Only edit migrations not yet applied to any environment' && exit 1
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs attention" with title "Claude Code"'
